message:
fix(audit): rustfmt drift cleanup + rate_limit token refund overflow guard

- Apply rustfmt to 8 files with accumulated formatting drift that was
  blocking quality gates for multiple agents (progress, conformance,
  mysql, postgres, buffer, rwlock, health, session)
- Fix potential u32 overflow in RateLimiter::cancel_entry token refund:
  use saturating_add before clamping to burst (rate_limit.rs:670)
- Skip database/pool.rs (held by LavenderBrook)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
